entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A developing nation characterized by wide agro-ecological diversity and a predominance of rainfed agriculture

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region characterized by wide agro-ecological diversity and a predominance of rainfed agriculture

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems operated by small-scale farmers facing a viability crisis in developing nations

entities.name: RISING INPUT COSTS
entities.description: Increasing expenses for agricultural inputs contributing to the viability crisis of smallholder farming

entities.name: DECLINING LABOUR-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A reduction in the efficiency of labor utilization within farming systems

entities.name: REDUCED FACTOR PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A decrease in the productivity of agricultural factors of production

entities.name: SUBOPTIMAL YIELD REALIZATION
entities.description: The failure to achieve potential crop yields

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agriculture that relies solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL SITUATION
entities.description: Unpredictable rainfall patterns that constrain the execution of essential field operations

entities.name: YIELD VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in crop yield resulting from erratic rainfall

entities.name: PRODUCTION RISK
entities.description: The risk associated with crop production due to environmental constraints

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Cropping systems designed to adapt to and withstand projected climate change impacts

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: An approach to increase agricultural productivity while reducing environmental impact

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by limited rainfall and high temperatures where sustainable intensification is an opportunity

entities.name: FARM MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The use of machinery to automate agricultural tasks

entities.name: DRAUGHT ANIMALS
entities.description: Animals used for pulling heavy loads or powering machinery in agriculture

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LABOUR
entities.description: The human workforce employed in farming activities

entities.name: RURAL TO URBAN MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of people from rural areas to cities, reducing available farm labor

entities.name: SCALE-APPROPRIATE MECHANIZATION
entities.description: Mechanization options designed to align with small and fragmented field sizes and limited resource endowments

entities.name: SMALL AND FRAGMENTED FIELD SIZES
entities.description: The physical characteristic of land holdings that hinders standard mechanization

entities.name: LIMITED RESOURCE ENDOWMENTS
entities.description: Lack of sufficient financial or physical resources available to farmers

entities.name: RURAL ENTREPRENEURSHIP
entities.description: The creation and development of business ventures in rural areas

entities.name: FARM INCOMES
entities.description: The total revenue earned from farming activities

entities.name: DRUDGERY
entities.description: Strenuous and hard physical work associated with manual farming

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION OF CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The practice of growing a variety of crops to improve resilience and food security
